devour_category.name: Prime beast
devour_category.desc: Large beasts (Blue Dragon, Behemoth, T-Rexaur, Ruby Dragon, Adamantoise, Chimera, Cactuar, Tonberry...).

devour_category.name: Standard
devour_category.desc: Standard enemies (Snow Lion, Fastitocalon, Hexadragon, Armadodo, Wendigo, Death Claw, Grand Mantis...).

devour_category.name: Small critter
devour_category.desc: Small/flying/venomous critters (Glacial Eye, Buel, Red Bat, Fastitocalon-F, Imp, Cockatrice, Bomb, Abyss Worm...).

devour_category.name: Machine
devour_category.desc: Machines (GIM52A, GIM47N, Elastoid, Iron Giant, Belhelmel).

devour_category.name: Inedible
devour_category.desc: Non-devourable: every boss/story monster. Also the failure code the engine itself writes on a missed devour.
